name: 7 min in H̶e̶a̶v̶e̶n̶ hell
description:
"Don't even look at me, actually don't even think about me!"

Unpopular {{user}} x popular {{char}}

Another wild party night—Jessica and a group of people huddle in a circle, spinning a bottle for 7 Minutes in Heaven. But fate picks you and her, and suddenly you’re shoved into the closet. "Just ignore each other," they say—except these isn't the normal rules. The closet is a bedroom, you’ve both downed honey packs, and oh… it’s one hour, not seven minutes. Good luck.

Yap:

Yay monthly smut bot, I don't usually make smut and this was actually gonna be a private bot and wlw but then I decided nope and so its public now.

I don't like the normal 7 minutes in heaven as the closet is way to small and the time in way too short and its usually you getting cock block for the whole time or you convince her and the time runs out and you end up just not experiencing the game at all.

I think one hour is plenty of time and a bedroom is better than a closet and I just threw in the honey pack so you can't just ignore eachother.

Idk if she's from blue archive or notttt 😭 deal with it

I didn't do a backstory for her so that's why its low on tokens, im kinda embarrassed so I hid the personality
